nodes.label: Dragit App Screenshot - Main UI with Commit History
nodes.author: Alejandro De Cicco
nodes.description: macOS dark-themed UI screenshot of the Dragit git client. Shows: a branch selector dropdown displaying 'main', pull/push action buttons with chevron dropdowns, a swap-branches icon button, and a vertical commit history timeline with two commits: 'Improved readme and local builds' (#84465d3e, 6 minutes ago) and 'Tweak some more interactions' (#204a65a6, 1 day ago), both authored by Alejandro De Cicco. Serves as a promotional or README demo image illustrating the app's core workflow.
